news.Title: The SpaceX IPO Should Help Rivian. Here's How.
news.Content:
After its record-breaking initial public offering (IPO), Space Exploration Technologies (NASDAQ: SPCX) , known as SpaceX, is now primed to go on a spending spree . In total, the company believes it is chasing an addressable market worth $28.5 trillion. More than 90% of that value, however, is tied up exclusively in artificial intelligence (AI) opportunities, not rockets or satellites.

With IPO proceeds totaling $86.7 billion, plus a possible $20 billion bond sale, SpaceX will aggressively invest in its AI business during the coming months and years. Which AI opportunities in particular will SpaceX and its founder, Elon Musk, target?

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

Scaling its data center infrastructure will be at the top of its list. That increase in compute power, however, will be used for a variety of purposes, one of which will surely be advancing the models that power autonomous driving systems .

Earlier this year, Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) -- another Musk company -- invested $2 billion into xAI, Musk's AI start-up. One month later, SpaceX merged with xAI.

It's not hard to connect the dots here. AI is a key enabler of self-driving technologies. And the future of Tesla is no longer relegated to simply selling cars but to operating a global robotaxi fleet -- an opportunity some experts value at $10 trillion long term.

xAI will perhaps be the biggest recipient of SpaceX's post-IPO spending. And because Tesla holds a direct stake in that business, expect xAI to allocate some of its resources to advancing AI systems that will help Tesla better capture the emerging robotaxi market.

Oddly enough, this situation could help an unrelated EV stock: Rivian (NASDAQ: RIVN) . There's a surprising connection here that many investors fail to appreciate.

How SpaceX's AI spending will end up helping Rivian

The global rollout of robotaxis is coming sooner than many expect. And the value of this market may also exceed most expectations.

"We think $8 trillion to $10 trillion for the entire autonomous taxi opportunity throughout the world, from almost nothing," predicts Cathie Wood, CEO of Ark Invest. "That's how quickly AI is going to cause these things to happen."

Other experts agree. "While L4 robo-taxis are now available in the first cities in the United States and China, the global rollout of robotaxis is now expected to become a reality at a large scale in 2030," concludes a research report from McKinsey. "Overall, experts expect that robotaxis will be the first commercial application for L4 in mobility -- not privately owned cars."

Story Continues

Major tech firms are already raising billions of dollars to tackle the nascent but high-potential robotaxi market. Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) , the parent company of Google, recently raised $16 billion for its Waymo robotaxi service, valuing that business at $126 billion. Uber Technologies (NYSE: UBER) has also committed more than $10 billion to scale its own robotaxi service.

But unlike Tesla, neither company can produce its own vehicles in-house. So if Tesla can ramp its autonomy capabilities quicker than before, thanks to SpaceX's elevated spending on xAI, other robotaxi competitors may fall behind in the critical area of physical vehicle production.

We're already seeing competitors respond to this reality. Earlier this year, Uber invested $1.25 billion in Rivian in exchange for as many as 50,000 Rivian vehicles -- which will be used to power Uber's robotaxi arm.

In a nutshell, the SpaceX IPO could indirectly accelerate the transition to robotaxis. Tesla can both produce its own vehicles and deploy its own self-driving software. Most of its competitors, however, lack physical manufacturing capabilities.

All this should help Rivian, a company investing heavily in producing robotaxi-capable vehicles, but that does not yet seem to be pursuing the launch of its own robotaxi service. In the coming years, I expect Rivian to become a key supplier to the robotaxi industry. Its deal with Uber is an early testament to that potential.

Down the road, I wouldn't be surprised to see a capital-rich big tech competitor buy the company outright to ensure its robotaxi arm remains as vertically integrated as Tesla's.

news.Title: The $725 Billion AI Capex Cycle Has 3 Bottlenecks: Power, Memory, and Optical Bandwidth. 3 Stocks Poised to Win Big.
news.Content:
Like any other new industry, the artificial intelligence (AI) business continues to evolve as it grows. It's getting better -- and more cost-effective -- by figuring out where it's deficient. And right now, its biggest roadblocks are a lack of memory chips, a strained supply of power, and networking solutions without nearly enough throughput capacity.

It's not afraid to spend big money shoring up these problems either. Given recent spending outlooks from top names in the AI infrastructure business, such as Microsoft , Amazon , and Alphabet 's Google, Goldman Sachs now expects $765 billion worth of AI infrastructure investments to be made this year alone. The lion's share of these are outlays likely to be directed at the three aforementioned bottlenecks.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

And this raises the question: Which companies are best positioned to benefit from this anticipated capital spending? Here's a closer look at a good guess for each category.

Power: GE Vernova

Ordinary utility companies are obviously beneficiaries of the soaring demand for electricity related to the proliferation of AI data centers. The International Energy Agency expects data centers' total power consumption to roughly double between now and 2030, to 945 TWh (terawatt hours). That's enough electricity to support a few dozen major cities.

The only problem? Most utility companies aren't in a great capital position to add the required electricity production capacity in the time frame they need to. In a rush, many of them are passing along their new build-out costs to consumers in the form of higher rates, which works, but isn't sustainable. In the long run, artificial intelligence data centers need to provide their own power.

Enter GE Vernova (NYSE: GEV) .

Yes, this is an offshoot of the old conglomerate you knew as General Electric, which began breaking itself up into more manageable pieces back in 2021. GE Vernova is the power arm of the iconic name, offering everything from wind turbines to grid management solutions to a nuclear power plant service.

Perhaps its most meaningful contribution to the next chapter of the AI revolution, however, is its well-proven, power-generating natural gas turbines.

Although originally built with utility companies in mind, with each one capable of producing a few hundred megawatts' worth of electricity, these sizable turbines are proving to be a practical solution for AI operators looking for self-sufficiency. It's providing 29 of its LM2500XPRESS gas turbines to AI infrastructure outfit Crusoe, for instance, while oil giant Chevron is testing one of its natural gas turbines as a source of power for a utility service intended to specifically serve AI data centers outside of the industry's consumer-facing ecosystem.

Story Continues

For perspective, while this power arm's revenue grew 10% year over year to $5 billion in Q1, it took $10 billion worth of new equipment orders during the same quarter. Indeed, the companywide backlog now stands at $163 billion, compared to Q1's total revenue of only $9.3 billion.

Memory: Micron Technology

There are really only three major computer memory manufacturers -- Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) , SK Hynix, and Samsung -- and shares of all three are well up since the global memory chip shortage reached critical levels in mid-2025. Be careful buying into any of them.

If you're looking for a specific one to step into on its next opportune pullback, though, Micron is arguably your best bet. Why? Although it's not the biggest in terms of total market share, it is the most focused player in the business and, arguably, best equipped for the future for a couple of reasons.

One of these reasons is how it does business. The company's signing more and more long-term strategic customer agreements, as opposed to more straightforward long-term agreements. As CEO Sanjay Mehrotra commented in March's second-quarter earnings conference call, "We continue to work with customers on strategic customer agreements, or SCAs, that are different from prior LTAs and have specific commitments over a multiyear time horizon for improved visibility and stability in our business model." He added, "We are excited to have signed our first five-year SCA."

The other distinguishing competitive edge is Micron's expertise at designing and manufacturing high-bandwidth memory (HBM) that not only consumes less total power but also occupies less room on a data center circuit board. Micron is sold out of this high-margin memory into 2027, but this dynamic could linger well beyond next year. An outlook from Precedence Research suggests the high-bandwidth memory chip market alone is poised to grow at an average annual pace of more than 25% through 2035.

Optical bandwidth: Marvell Technology

Finally, you probably know that Broadcom is one of the market's most-mentioned data center networking names, largely reflecting its size and long-established business. And if you own (or will own) a stake in this company, you'll be fine.

If you're looking for a name that packs a little more punch because it's smaller and scrappier, though, Marvell Technology (NASDAQ: MRVL) may be your better bet.

But first things first. What's optical bandwidth?

You likely understand that a data center is mostly just thousands of computers linked together into a single, unified "brain." But, in that artificial intelligence data centers are analyzing as well as producing massive amounts of digital data, the routers, switches, and other networking solutions of yesteryear just aren't up to the modern-day task anymore. The industry needs to move information at the speed of light -- literally -- using equipment that sends and receives data using fiber-optic connections. To this end, Goldman Sachs believes the optical networking market will eventually grow ninefold to a $150 billion-plus business.

Marvell makes such equipment. For instance, earlier this month, the company unveiled the industry's first-ever switch capable of processing 102.4 terabits of digital data every second, allowing AI data centers to achieve the next level of computing performance.

Simply being in the right business at the right time doesn't make Marvell a must-have, however. Although it certainly helps, Marvell Technology's distinguishing advantage is that it designs and manufactures complete turn-key AI data center networking systems that include Ethernet controllers, disk drive controllers, and even custom-built computing processors that all seamlessly work together. Last quarter's top-line year-over-year growth of 28% speaks volumes about demand for its technology, as does the 40% growth analysts expect for the full fiscal year.

news.Title: 5 Dividend Stocks to Buy and Hold Forever
news.Content: Buying a stock to hold forever isn't as simple as it sounds. Few companies can consistently win year in and year out, decade after decade. But it does happen in evergreen industries, such as healthcare and consumer goods, where brand power, deep pockets, and even patents can keep competitors at bay. Achieving decades of uninterrupted dividend increases is a remarkable feat that only world-class companies can pull off. Remember, dividends are a cash expense, so a business must grow to continue sending all that ...

news.Title: Amazon (AMZN): The Best High Quality Stock to Buy for the Long Term
news.Content:
Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) is one of the

12 High Quality Stocks to Buy for the Long Term .

On June 16, 2026, PennyMac Financial Services (PFSI) expanded its strategic agreement with Amazon Web Services, an Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) company, to accelerate its transformation into an AI-driven mortgage technology leader. PennyMac is using AWS’ generative AI capabilities to upgrade its mortgage application and servicing processes, including conversational AI-powered virtual assistant capabilities powered by Amazon Nova Sonic. Jim Follette, Chief Digital Officer at Pennymac, said the company is using technology to change how mortgages are made and deliver a more seamless borrower journey.

Earlier in June, Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) announced a series of investments tied to employee upskilling, faster international deliveries, European operations expansion, job creation, and robotics. Amazon also said the next generation of its autonomous Proteus robot is being piloted in its labs, with deployment in Europe planned for the first half of 2027. As part of the EUR 10B investment, Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) plans to grow its European fulfillment center workforce by 25,000 over the coming years. The company is also committing $1B to Career Choice by 2030, expanding access to fully funded training for careers in cybersecurity, software development, logistics, renewable energy, and mechatronics.

Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) sells consumer products and provides advertising, subscription, and related services through online and physical stores in North America and internationally.

news.Title: OpenAI and Anthropic Could Both Go Public by Year-End. These ETFs Let You Own Them Today.
news.Content:
As OpenAI and Anthropic prepare to transition from the two most valuable private companies in the world to publicly traded stocks, excitement is building among growth investors. Both artificial intelligence (AI) companies have filed confidential S-1 registration statements with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), paving the way for potential initial public offerings (IPOs) by the end of the year.

Unfortunately, the IPO process often excludes everyday investors. Instead, companies work with investment banks to prepare the S-1, which details the business model, historical financials, operational risks, and governance structure. A roadshow then follows, during which executives pitch the investment thesis to large institutional buyers.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

Book building is the phase during which underwriters collect indications of demand from hedge funds, mutual funds, endowments, and other accredited investors to set the final offering price. For this reason, retail investors rarely receive allocations at the IPO price, because they lack the relationships or financial scale that banks prioritize.

As a result, most individuals have to wait until IPO stocks list on public exchanges, where initial trading frequently occurs at a premium driven by enthusiasm and limited supply. Fortunately, there are several accessible investment products that provide retail investors with exposure to both OpenAI and Anthropic without needing to wait for the IPO bell.

KraneShares Public-Private AI & Technology ETF (AGIX)

The KraneShares Artificial Intelligence and Technology Public and Private ETF (NASDAQ: AGIX) is interesting because it holds a basket of public stocks that are complemented by select positions in private AI companies. The exchange-traded fund (ETF) has a direct position in Anthropic, giving shareholders exposure to one of the most prominent frontier AI labs.

Beyond this private stake, however, the fund also owns stock in companies that have made strategic investments in Anthropic -- namely, Alphabet and Amazon . This structure creates layered exposure to Anthropic's long-term success. With shares trading right on the Nasdaq , the ETF offers daily liquidity and ease of purchase through standard brokerage accounts.

Overall, the KraneShares AI and Technology Public-Private ETF lets investors capture growth across the full AI value chain -- from generative model developers to the infrastructure and application builders. While its expense ratio of 0.99% is a premium compared to most ETFs, investors should keep in mind that they are paying up for direct exposure to private businesses that are usually off limits.

Story Continues

For investors seeking a targeted AI portfolio that includes a private-market kicker without the accredited investor requirement, this fund provides a straightforward solution.

Cathie Wood's Ark Venture Fund

The Ark Venture Fund (NASDAQMUTFUND: ARKVX) is managed by technology investor Cathie Wood. The fund maintains an 8.5% weighting in OpenAI and 6.4% weighting in Anthropic. Moreover, the Ark Venture Fund holds other high-conviction private names in disruptive innovation, such as Kalshi and Figure AI.

What distinguishes the Ark Venture fund from most ETFs is its structure as an interval fund . An interval fund is a closed-end vehicle that periodically offers to repurchase a portion of shares outstanding from investors. The idea here is to offer more liquidity than a traditional closed-end fund or direct private equity investment.

Investors need to remember that redemptions are limited to the fund's scheduled intervals and may be subject to prorating if sale requests exceed available liquidity. In addition, the Ark Venture Fund requires a $500 minimum investment to buy shares.

With meaningful holdings in both OpenAI and Anthropic, this fund is designed to democratize access to venture capital opportunities while balancing the need for capital flexibility.

What is in the Ark Innovation ETF?

Another one of Wood's funds is the Ark Innovation ETF (NYSEMKT: ARKK) . As Wood's flagship ETF focused on disruptive innovation, the Ark Innovation fund incorporates a direct private holding in OpenAI alongside a core portfolio of publicly traded growth stocks in AI, genomics, fintech, and autonomous technology.

The position in OpenAI enhances the fund's thematic alignment with frontier AI development. The Ark Innovation ETF trades on exchanges with full daily liquidity, making it simple for everyday investors to buy or sell shares without restrictions. Although its holdings are far more diversified than a pure private fund, the OpenAI stake provides targeted pre-IPO exposure wrapped inside a familiar ETF.

Like the KraneShares ETF, the Ark Innovation fund boasts a rich expense ratio of 0.75%. For those who already follow Wood's innovation-focused strategy, the fund still represents a convenient way to add OpenAI to your portfolio while also riding the tailwinds of several next-generation technologies.

news.Title: 《日股》日經收漲1.55% 衝破7.2萬點/續創高
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-06-22 16:40:24 數位內容中心 發佈

日股今(22)日延續強勢。日經225指數收於72353.96點，上漲1103.90點或1.55%，續創收盤新高並首次衝破7.2萬點，盤中最高觸及72831.73點；東證股價指數(TOPIX)收於4095.05點，上漲50.09點或1.24%。兩大指數同步刷新高點，盤面主軸仍是風險偏好改善與AI、半導體題材延燒。市場對美國與伊朗協議進展的期待，帶動日股買氣升溫，資金也持續追逐大型成長股，推動指數在高檔再度走高。

權值股方面，日經225指數的上漲主要由大型權值股帶動，其中Fujikura(5803.JP)與愛德萬測試(6857.JP)對指數上行貢獻明顯。盤中資金也集中在東京威力科創(8035.JP)、軟銀集團(9984.JP)、Kioxia Holdings(285A.JP)與FANUC(6954.JP)等個股，顯示市場仍偏好具成長想像的龍頭標的。

類股輪動方面，非鐵金屬、電機與銀行表現較強，AI、半導體相關買盤持續擴散，成為盤面最鮮明的主軸；相較之下，紙漿紙業、不動產與空運走勢偏弱，資金輪動特徵相當清楚。

《日股》日經漲1.65% 衝破7.1萬點/續創收盤新高

《日股》日經225強彈、漲逾1800點

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: 外資買超684億元創史上第9大　加碼00981A排第一
news.Content:
（中央社記者曾仁凱台北2026年6月22日電）台積電 (2330) 今天股價衝上新台幣2510元，率台股開高走高，終場集中市場指數上漲1276.31點，收在47741.51點，創台股史上第8大收盤漲點。成交值約1兆4436億元。根據台灣證券交易所統計，3大法人合計買超708.97億元。

觀察三大法人籌碼動向，外資及陸資（不含外資自營商）今天買超684.57億元，連2買，為史上第9大外資單日買超金額。自營商今天也買超121.04億元，投信則站在賣方，賣超96.64億元。

個股方面，外資今天買超前3名分別為主動統一台股增長ETF（00981A）8萬4983張，台玻 (1802) 5萬5470張，和中鋼 (2002) 4萬4581張。

賣超榜方面，今天外資賣超前3名為群創 (3481) 11萬7423張，華邦電 (2344) 10萬3086張，和主動富邦台股龍耀（00405A）4萬1538張。

資深分析師蔡明翰分析，台股形成健康輪動，前陣子台積電股價休息，金融股等其他低基期股票挺身而出。今天台積電回神，率領半導體與AI族群強攻，台股又創新高。

蔡明翰認為，台積電前段時間走勢落後大盤，今天補漲，接下來台積電預計7月中召開法說會，有機會率領台股指數持續向上挺進。

news.Title: 傳縮減28奈米產能　台積電：成熟製程策略不變
news.Content:
（中央社記者張建中新竹2026年6月22日電）市場傳出，台積電 (2330) 積極衝刺先進製程，縮減28奈米製程產能，聯電 (2303) 和世界先進 (5347) 可望受惠轉單效應。台積電今天重申，在成熟製程技術的策略並無改變，將繼續優化成熟製程技術的產品組合，並專注於更高的附加價值和策略性市場。

市場傳出，台積電今年初28奈米月投片量約20萬片，6月降至15萬片，主要是將28奈米產能轉為支援矽中介層，部分客戶轉向尋求聯電和世界先進協助。

台積電今天重申，在成熟製程技術的策略並無改變，將繼續優化成熟製程技術的產能組合，並專注於更高附加價值和策略性市場，同時確保有足夠的產能支持客戶成長。

台積電於4月法人說明會中指出，台積電實際正在增加成熟製程技術產能，如日本JASM第1座晶圓廠是針對影像感測器應用，德國ESMC針對汽車與工業應用。（編輯：張良知）

news.Title: 台股ETF五月除息，主動群益台灣強棒配息率居主動式產品之冠
news.Content:
【財訊快報／記者劉居全報導】五月除息的台股ETF陸續公告配息資訊，根據群益投信官網最新配息公告顯示，主動群益台灣強棒(00982A)本次預估每股配發金額為0.64元，預估單次配息率約2.9%、年化配息率近11.6%。除息日訂於5月19日，因此想參與00982A本次領息的投資人，最晚須在5月18日買進，收益分配發放日於6月12日。財務管理專家指出，目前市面上已有四檔主動式台股ETF有配息紀錄，分為00980A、00981A、00982A以及00984A，若就這四檔產品最近一次配息表現來看，又以00982A最令人驚豔，本次配息金額0.64元，較前期的0.377元，調升0.263元，金額成長幅度近7成，預估年化配息率達11.6%，配息金額與年化配息率皆創下自身與整體主動式台股ETF新高紀錄，可說是主動式台股ETF配息王。

財富管理專家進一步指出，觀察00982A上市以來的配息紀錄，呈現季季調升，且過去幾次配息皆順利填息。從績效表現來看，今年來雖然市場大小波動不斷，包括美國關稅餘波、美伊衝突等等，00982A在主動靈活操作與精準選股下，今年來含息報酬表現近54.41%，明顯優於大盤的40.54%，可說是讓持有的投資人息利雙收。

市場法人表示，隨著美伊衝突稍有緩解，加上AI需求持續暢旺，特別是AI伺服器及零組件族群表現強勢，抵銷了外部環境的不確定性，台股多頭趨勢有望延續，呈現產業多點開花的健康輪動格局，包括先進製程、電源管理、AI基礎建設、低軌衛星、光通訊INP基板等類股表現值得留意，主動式台股ETF正是投資人可多加運用的工具，透過經理人與研究團隊主動挖掘市場潛在投資機會，進行主動配置來尋求創造超額報酬的機會，也能因應不同市況，更快的調整投資組合來應對。

news.Title: 雙虎翻身！ 這次發財不靠面板 劇本直接寫到3年後
news.Content:
本土法人調升面板雙虎評等至買進，看好友達MicroLED CPO模組與群創卡位台積電下一代先進封裝玻璃基板，長線題材增溫，目標價分別看好35.20元與85.30元。

友達先進領域成股價新題材

本土法人指出，友達轉型至智慧移動與垂直場域等垂直市場的實際成效已經顯現。此外，公司也持續積極尋求切入新領域，近期以MicroLED CPO模組的發展最具想像空間。考量近期光通訊相關題材增溫，本土法人將友達的投資建議調整為「買進」，目標價上看35.20元。雖然該模組發展尚處於早期階段，產品最快預估於2至3年後才得以上市，對友達2026年的營收貢獻相對有限，但長線營收成長的想像空間可期，已成為重要股價題材。

群創多元跨域卡位先進封裝

由於AI晶片尺寸持續放大，預估台積電的先進封裝技術CoWoS將逐漸無法滿足需求。為此，台積電已加速開發下一代先進封裝技術CoPoS，並在近日向供應鏈釋出的「CoWoS玻璃基板」開發計畫中，確定群創為重要夥伴，長線發展想像空間可期，故本土法人將群創的投資建議調整為「買進」，目標價上看85.3元。由於玻璃基板擁有低翹曲、低熱膨脹、高剛性等特性，導入晶片封裝製程後將有助於改善翹曲、降低有效熱膨脹係數，及顯著提升封裝性能。台積電CoPoS相關訂單將成為群創長線營收的重要潛在動能。

群創今天創下波段新高，股價來到69.9元，美中不足的是開高走低，收在今天的相對低點。友達則是早盤就已衝到漲停鎖住，股價來到30.95元，交易量達到29.5萬張。

（封面示意圖/AI生成）

news.Title: In 6 Words, Fed Chair Kevin Warsh Just Dropped the Hammer on Wall Street
news.Content: Over the last six weeks, investors have been privy to the tail-end of earnings season, the largest initial public offering (IPO) in history, and have witnessed the Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJINDICES: ^DJI) , S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) , and Nasdaq Composite (NASDAQINDEX: ^IXIC) rocket to record highs. But arguably, no event has been more meaningful than the changing of ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Fed Chair Kevin Warsh's concise statements emphasize a focus on delivering price stability, signaling a hawkish stance on inflation.
• Warsh's priority is to combat persistently high inflation, which has reached a three-year high of 4.2%.
• Nine of 18 FOMC members expect interest rates to increase by the end of 2026, a shift from earlier expectations of rate cuts.
• A potential rate hike poses a significant risk to the historically expensive stock market, particularly for AI data center build-outs financed by debt.
• Warsh's approach contrasts with Jerome Powell's more detailed and forward-looking statements.
news.Keywords: inflation, price stability, interest rates, monetary policy, FOMC

news.Title: 中信投信：外資青睞台股，上週買超32.8億美元居亞股之冠
news.Content:
【財訊快報／記者劉居全報導】美國與伊朗首輪和平談判結束，雙方同意60天內達成結束戰爭的最終協議，隨著戰事落幕及荷姆茲海峽恢復通航之預期，國際油價開始下跌，並推升市場風險偏好。中國信託投信表示，觀察上週資金流向，新興亞股整體呈現淨流入46.5億美元，其中，台股最受外資青睞，獲買超32.8億美元最多，其次為南韓，外資買超12億美元，外資也同步買超印度及菲律賓3.1億及0.3億美元。賣超部分，外資賣超越南1.1億美元，賣超印尼0.5億美元、泰國0.1億美元。指數漲跌部分，中國信託投信表示，上週新興亞股漲多於跌，整體平均上漲4.7%，其中，南韓股市單週上漲11.4%表現強勁，今年來漲幅已達117.1%居亞洲之冠，而台股單週上漲5.2%表現居次，其他市場如：菲律賓、印尼、越南、印度也有1.7%至3.8%不等的漲幅，僅有泰國呈現下跌1.3%。

市場通膨觀察，中國信託策略優利多重資產基金經理人羅世明指出，美伊雙方首輪談判落幕，荷姆茲海峽的商業船隻逐漸恢復正常通行，預期今年第三季布蘭特原油價格回落至每桶70到80美元，將有助於降低全球通膨壓力。羅世明補充，從市場對通膨預期來看，美國2年期公債殖利率目前約在4.05%，仍高於聯準會基準利率中值約3.6%，代表市場訂價已反映未來可能還會升息2至3次，若今年下半年聯準會維持利率水準不變，資金市場有機會因為政策比預期寬鬆而上漲。

美股觀察，羅世明指出，根據Factset數據，美國標普500指數成分股今年第一季獲利年增28.4%，創2021年第四季來單季最高水準，顯示美國企業基本面表現強勁、獲利維持高成長，在總體經濟擴張、企業獲利成長及貨幣政策方向仍維持相對寬鬆趨勢下，對今年全球成熟市場股債投資仍維持正向樂觀。

操作上，羅世明認為，全球股市評價仍反映總體經濟擴張，加上通膨可望降溫，下半年投資人可持續配置多重資產基金，除了能掌握AI趨勢下股票資本利得機會，以及市場債券利率反映通膨預期降溫而下滑，所帶來債券價格上漲空間，透過多重資產配置，也能進一步降低投資組合的波動風險。

越南股市觀察，中國信託越南機會基金經理人張晨瑋表示，6月越南股市處在消息真空期，短線預期將持續進入整理，或許較無顯著方向性，就基本面觀察，越南5月經濟數據整體表現大致穩健，工業生產年增達8.8%，今年前5個月累計增幅達9.1%，創4年來同期新高。

另外，越南今年前5個月出口年增18%，進口年增33.8%，能源與半導體零組件供應短缺，使企業提前擴大採購，而越南5月製造業PMI由4月的50.5攀升至52.8，為今年2月以來最高水準。

張晨瑋補充，通膨方面，越南5月通膨年增率雖然從5.46%攀升至5.60%，主要受地緣政治推升運輸與能源成本，住房建材與服務價格亦走高，不過，通膨月增率僅0.29%，增幅較過去明顯放緩，顯示短期通膨上行壓力已有所降溫。

張晨瑋認為，受惠越南經濟基本面維持穩健，通膨壓力降溫，及地緣政治不確定趨緩，長線偏多看法不變，在基金操作上，應對短線市場空窗期，優先以大型權值股作為核心布局，當中包含VIN集團、國有銀行等大型藍籌股，隨著越南市場升級新興市場，外資陸續進駐越南，大型藍籌股往往也是被動型資金的首選標的。

news.Title: Better Crypto for the Next Bull Run: Bitcoin vs. Ethereum
news.Content: The crypto market typically moves in four-year cycles of boom and bust. That's why 2027 is shaping up to be a pivotal year for investors. If 2026 continues to be a bust year for crypto, 2027 could be the start of the next bull market run. With that in mind, the No. 1 crypto I'm buying for the next bull run is Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) , not Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) . ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The crypto market is expected to see a potential bull run starting in 2027 after a bust year in 2026.
• Bitcoin is favored over Ethereum for the next bull run due to its higher historical CAGR (38% vs. 23%) and stronger performance in 2023-2024.
• Potential catalysts for Bitcoin include a 'Strategic Bitcoin Reserve' and proposals to use government Bitcoin holdings to reduce national debt.
• Ethereum faces increased competition from faster networks like Solana and may have capped future upside.
• The upcoming Bitcoin halving in 2028 is historically a bullish signal, often preceding the most speculative phase of a crypto bull market.
news.Keywords: crypto market, bull run, Bitcoin, Ethereum, halving event

news.Title: 台股飆破4萬7  他問「長線會修正」？ 專家曝最佳上車點
news.Content:
受美伊衝突降溫、停戰談判展開激勵，台股22日再度上演強勁多頭行情，盤中一度狂飆逾1400點，終場大漲1276點，以47741點作收，不僅刷新歷史新高，也正式站穩4萬7千點大關，距離市場關注的4萬8千點僅一步之遙。成交量同步放大至1.44兆元，顯示市場資金動能依舊充沛。

權王台積電同樣成為推升指數的重要功臣，尾盤爆出大量買盤，單日成交逾6700張，終場收在2510元歷史新天價，漲幅達4.15%，再度帶領AI與半導體供應鏈全面上攻。

面對台股一路驚驚漲，不少投資人開始擔憂後市風險。有網友22日在《台大批踢踢》股板發文表示，近期台股表現異常強勢，每次拉回整理時間都相當短暫，很快就能再創新高，甚至連美股出現震盪時，台股也幾乎不受影響。他直言打開月K線圖後更是感到震撼，幾乎呈現一路向上的走勢，因此好奇詢問：「台股長線還有回檔修正的可能性嗎？」

對此，總經專家吳嘉隆22日在臉書上發文指出，市場不應再以傳統景氣循環的角度看待目前行情。他認為，當前驅動台股上漲的核心力量並非短期景氣波動，而是AI浪潮所帶動的新一輪產業革命。

吳嘉隆表示，股市反映的是未來經濟前景，而AI、高效能運算及科技產業的快速發展，正大幅改變全球經濟結構與企業獲利模式，因此台股與台積電走的是長期上升趨勢。他更直言，台積電與大盤目前都處於「翻倍行情趕進度」階段。

不過他也強調，多頭市場並非一路直線上漲，中途仍會出現拉回整理與換手過程，但這些修正往往是新資金進場的機會。他指出，投資人雖然未必能精準買在最低點，但只要掌握長期趨勢，拉回時分批布局，未來仍有機會迎來獲利空間。

他寫道：「拉回幾乎都是買點，對台積電來講，更是如此，所有拉回無一例外，都是買點。就是說，你買了都有機會賺錢。整理完之後都會再攻。」他也強調，肯定不會買到最低點，但是仍有機會賺到錢，「將來你會看到反彈上去，幾乎無一例外」。

（封面圖／東森財經新聞）

news.Title: 《台股盤後》大漲1276點、首收47K，日K連六紅
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-06-22 16:10:45 新聞中心 發佈

美伊展開和談提振市場信心、日經225指數早盤亦有亮眼表現，加上台積電受惠外資調升目標價等激勵下，台股今(22)日跳空開高，在權王台積電衝上2510元新天價，以及聯電、日月光投控、南亞科、南亞等權值股鎖漲停帶動下，盤中漲點一度超過1400點、最高觸及47871.19點，強勢站上47000大關並改寫歷史新高，終場收在47741.51點，大漲1276.31點或2.75%，同步刷新收盤新高、日K連六紅，成交量則略縮至1兆4414.68億元。

美國股市上週五因「六月節」假期休市。亞洲股市方面，因AI、半導體相關股嗨，帶動日經225指數大漲，首度衝破7.2萬點關卡、刷新歷史新高紀錄，終場收漲1.55%；韓國KOSPI指數收漲0.69%。

台股今日延續上週多頭氣勢，終場順利站穩47,000點大關，同步改寫盤中及收盤歷史新高。台積電受惠外資調高目標價，終場以新天價2510元作收，上漲4.15%，總市值突破65兆元。在台積電領軍下，整體電子及半導體類股漲勢凌厲，聯電、力積電、日月光投控、景碩、瑞昱、京元電子、聯詠、愛普*齊飆漲停，矽力*-KY、台光電、欣興、聯發科都走高；國內記憶體族群受惠美光(Micron)勁揚，推升南亞科、旺宏雙雙攻上漲停，華邦電、威剛、十銓、宇瞻、宜鼎、群聯也有不錯表現。

以29大類股來看，玻璃陶瓷類股漲幅最高、大漲7.32%，中釉亮燈漲停，台玻、和成強漲逾7%；塑膠族群在南亞漲停帶動下亦表現不俗、收漲6.64%，漲幅居次；半導體類股同步走強、上漲4.32%，漲幅居第三。然而，建材營造、居家生活類股則遭遇賣壓，分別下挫3.01%與2.37%。

三大法人動向方面，今日三大法人合計買超708.97億元；其中，自營商買超121.04億元，投信賣超96.64億元，外資及陸資買超684.58億元。

news.Title: 三星電子有望取得Google第10代TPU訂單
news.Content:
三星電子有望取得Google第10代TPU訂單

依據韓媒《首爾經濟》本(2026)年6月15日報導，Google刻正評估將第10代TPU(張量處理單元—代號Icefish)之關鍵零組件I/O Die(記憶體輸入/輸出晶粒)轉由三星電子生產。分析指出，Google此舉旨係為增加AI供應鏈多元化，克服對台積電過度依賴，同時確保掌握AI加速器效能之高頻寬記憶體(HBM)之領先地位。Google繼2024年起將智慧型手機應用處理器(AP)訂單轉至台積電後，時隔兩年再度考慮與三星電子晶圓代工業務部門合作。

I/O Die係連接運算晶片與HBM、確保數據順暢傳輸之關鍵零組件。據悉，Google以2028年Icefish量產為目標，並可能採雙軌供應－由台積電負責1.4奈米製程的核心運算晶片、由三星電子負責2奈米製程的I/O Die。Google此舉顯示三星電子成功打破過去由台積電獨佔之I/O Die領域；三星電子在研發第6代高頻寬記憶體(HBM4)過程中，已累積自家I/O Die技術，現在可望憑藉該技術打進Google核心AI加速器供應鏈。

Google與三星電子曾於2021~2024年曾共同生產Pixel手機之Tensor晶片，且上(2025)年Google 60%以上TPU所需HBM皆由三星電子供應，雙方合作關係緊密。

同時，三星電子有望藉此擠身可同時提供晶圓先進製程、HBM及先進封裝之整合元件製造商(IDM)，展現其一站式整體解決方案(Turnkey Solution)競爭力。倘I/O Die訂單成立，績效不佳的三星電子非記憶體(晶圓代工及系統LSI)事業部門，則可望於2028年轉虧為盈。(資料來源：經濟部國際貿易署)

news.Title: Will Social Security Recipients Get a History-Making COLA in 2027? Here's What the Experts Say.
news.Content: When the Social Security Administration (SSA) announced that retirees on Social Security would be getting a 2.8% cost-of-living adjustment (COLA) in 2026, a lot of people weren't happy. Many assumed a boost that size would be inadequate. And while they couldn't have known it at the time, they were right. In the wake of the Iran war, inflation has surged. May's Consumer Price Index for Urban Wage Earners and Clerical ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Social Security recipients received a 2.8% cost-of-living adjustment (COLA) in 2026, which proved insufficient due to surging inflation.
• May's Consumer Price Index for Urban Wage Earners and Clerical Workers (CPI-W) increased 4.4% annually, impacting COLA calculations.
• Estimates for the 2027 COLA are higher, with the Senior Citizens League predicting 3.8% and analyst Mary Johnson forecasting 4.7%.
• Elevated inflation is necessary for a larger COLA, but it also means higher prices for recipients, with COLAs intended to help keep pace with costs rather than improve financial standing.
news.Keywords: Social Security, COLA, inflation, CPI-W, retirement income

news.Title: 全民進場訊號？台股投資情緒全面轉多
news.Content:
財經中心／王駿凱報導

國泰投顧最新「2026年6月國民經濟信心調查」顯示，受惠全球AI需求持續擴張、美伊戰事停火進入談判，以及台灣出口動能穩健，民眾對整體景氣與金融市場的樂觀情緒明顯升溫，多項指標同步創下歷史新高。

在景氣展望方面，調查指出，隨國發會公布4月景氣對策信號維持紅燈，領先指標與同時指標同步走升，顯示整體景氣仍維持穩健成長。本月民眾景氣現況樂觀指數升至32，展望樂觀指數升至25.5，均較前期明顯上揚。同時，薪資現況指數升至18.8，創下歷史新高；大額消費意願指數亦攀升至21.6，同樣創高；耐久財消費意願則小幅改善至-0.8，顯示民眾消費信心持續回溫。在總體預期方面，調查顯示民眾平均預期2026年經濟成長率為7.12%，其中59%受訪者認為經濟成長將高於7%。相較主計總處預估的9.64%，民眾預期略為保守，但仍維持高成長共識。通膨預期方面，民眾平均預期2026年通膨率為2.26%，且有58%受訪者認為將高於2%，顯示對物價壓力仍存一定疑慮，略高於官方預估的1.93%。股市信心部分，受AI產業帶動企業獲利上修，以及全球四大雲端服務供應商（CSP）持續提高資本支出影響，台股近期表現強勁。本月調查顯示，民眾台股樂觀指數升至54.5，風險偏好指數升至40.6，雙雙續創歷史新高，反映市場情緒明顯偏多。

在ETF投資行為調查方面，有26%民眾僅投資被動式ETF，24%同時持有主動與被動ETF，19%僅投資主動式ETF。投資目的以長期資產累積為主，占比達54%，另有16%偏好穩定領息，7%以分散風險為主要考量。對於未來一年ETF操作策略，有50%受訪者計畫買進並持有超過一年，18%維持現有部位，13%則傾向短期進出。影響投資決策的主要因素中，AI產業發展被視為最關鍵變數，占比達54%，其次為台灣企業獲利與景氣（19%），以及全球股市與風險情緒（15%）。本次調查反映在AI產業驅動下，台灣民眾對經濟與股市信心持續升溫，資金偏向中長期配置，市場風險偏好同步提升。

《民視新聞網》提醒您：內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。

原文出處： 全民進場訊號？台股投資情緒全面轉多

news.Title: 台積電衝2500元！2原因大漲　不敗教主讚：物美價廉
news.Content:
【江宜潔／綜合報導】台股今（22）日開盤首度突破47000點大關，其中 台積電 （2330）開高走高大漲90元、一度攻上2500元新天價，市值達64.83兆元也創新高，而號稱「不敗教主」的理財達人 陳重銘 則分析，台積電之所以大漲主要有兩原因。

截至上午10時30分，台股早盤一度上漲最多1405.99點、盤中新高來到47871.19點；其中，台積電股價上漲100元或4.15%、暫報2510元，鴻海股價上漲3元或1.12%、暫報271.5元，台達電股價平盤震盪、報2150元，聯發科股價上漲150元或3.42%、暫報4540元。

「台積電大漲，盤中衝到2500元！」至於為何能大漲？陳重銘稍早表示，主要是因台積電業績真的強強滾，再來就是其他AI類股漲翻天，使大家覺得台積電相對物美價廉，且台積電本益比也較低，因此資金也就回流至台積電。

此外，陳重銘提及，今年法人預估台積電EPS（每股盈餘）介於90至100元之間，「我是樂觀100元附近，所以目前本益比約25倍！」

• 新晶片將大幅提升SRAM容量至2-3倍，並升級至HBM4E，預計2027年底投產，成為聯發科2028年營運動能。
• Google額外追加100萬至200萬顆訂單，Triggerfish單價較Humufish高約30%，預計為聯發科帶來顯著營收增長。
• 此合作驗證聯發科在Google TPU v9世代中的首選合作夥伴地位，有助於緩解CPU wall與memory wall瓶頸。
news.Keywords: AI晶片,聯發科,Google,TPU,HBM4E

news.Title: 2 Nuclear Stocks Worth Buying After the SpaceX IPO
news.Content: The SpaceX (NASDAQ: SPCX) IPO is complete. Now, the spending spree begins. What will SpaceX be spending all of its newfound IPO cash on? The answer is obvious if you read through the company's IPO prospectus : artificial intelligence (AI). "We believe we have identified the largest actionable total addressable market in human history," SpaceX's IPO prospectus boldly claims. The company values its total addressable market at an astounding $28.5 trillion. More than 90% of that total opportunity ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX's IPO is expected to fuel spending on its AI division, which it identifies as its largest actionable total addressable market ($28.5 trillion).
• The growth of AI is constrained by energy supply, with data centers being highly energy-intensive.
• SpaceX's long-term solution involves orbital data centers, but terrestrial power sources are currently needed.
• The article suggests two nuclear energy stocks, NuScale Power (SMR) and Oklo (OKLO), as potential beneficiaries of increased energy demand from AI companies.
• The mention of Nvidia's potential signal is a recurring theme across multiple articles.
news.Keywords: SpaceX IPO, AI, energy demand, nuclear energy, small modular reactors (SMR)

news.Title: 3 Stocks That Look Like Far Better Long-Term Investments Than the SpaceX IPO
news.Content: The Space Exploration Technologies (NASDAQ: SPCX) , or SpaceX, IPO has captured a lot of attention, with many investors focused on what it could do in the future. While that's an exciting proposition to consider, several companies have a fairly well-established future, and it's quite bright. One industry I'm bullish on over the long term is cloud computing, and I think these three ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The article argues that cloud computing giants Amazon (AMZN), Microsoft (MSFT), and Alphabet (GOOG) are better long-term investments than SpaceX.
• These companies are major beneficiaries of the rising demand for AI, with their cloud services (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) being highly profitable.
• Hyperscalers are projected to spend over $650 billion on data center CapEx in 2026, with estimates rising to over $1 trillion by next year.
• Amazon and Microsoft are considered historically cheap based on operating cash flow, while Alphabet is reasonably valued.
• SpaceX's valuation (market cap $2.5 trillion, $6.6 billion adjusted EBITDA in 2025) results in a high price-to-adjusted EBITDA ratio of 379, suggesting it needs significant growth to justify its valuation.
news.Keywords: cloud computing, AI infrastructure, data centers, valuation, capital expenditures

news.Title: 突破47K！台股收47741點刷新收盤紀錄 台積電收2510元新高
news.Content:
端午連假後，台股今（22）天在 台積電 帶領下展現瘋狂行情，以46679點開盤後，直接跳空，一舉攻破4萬7千點大關，盤中最高衝到47871點。終場台股暴漲1276點，收在47741.51點，漲幅2.75%，一口氣刷新盤中和收盤最高紀錄，也是史上第8大單日漲點，成交量1兆4414億元。

護國神山台積電（2330）以2455元開出，盤中最高2510元，終場維持好表現，收在2510元，大漲100元，漲幅4.15%，同步改寫歷史新高。

其他權值股部分，聯發科（2454）漲75元，收在4465元，漲幅1.71%；鴻海（2317）持平，收268.5元；台達電（2308）持平，收2150元；台光電（2383）漲225元，收5825元，漲幅4.02%。

責任編輯／施佳宜

news.Title: 3 Excellent Dividend Stocks to Buy on the Dip
news.Content: Many investors are chasing life-changing gains by buying shares in top artificial intelligence companies. That makes sense. The industry could offer (and already has offered) multiple transformative investment opportunities. It's a great idea to try to capitalize on this. However, it's also important not to forget about other proven strategies for earning solid long-term returns, one of which is to invest in strong dividend-paying corporations. With that in mind, let's consider three dividend stocks that are worth buying right now: AbbVie (NYSE: ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The article recommends three dividend stocks: AbbVie (ABBV), Walmart (WMT), and Becton, Dickinson (BDX) as alternatives to chasing AI gains.
• AbbVie, despite recent sector weakness, shows strong financial results and a bright long-term outlook driven by Skyrizi and Rinvoq.
• Walmart is expected to perform well in a challenging retail environment due to its competitive pricing and growing e-commerce and digital advertising businesses.
• Becton, Dickinson faces challenges but may offer competitive returns with dividends reinvested.
• All three companies are noted for their dividend track records, with AbbVie and Walmart being Dividend Kings.
news.Keywords: dividend stocks, value investing, income strategy, healthcare, retail

news.Title: 台股飆上4萬7 高息ETF高檔熄火？0056、00878年化殖利率跌破4％ 阮慕驊：得靠1招救
news.Content:
台股端午暴力變盤，今（22）日為節後首個交易日，盤中大漲1276點，直接衝破4萬7，財經專家阮慕驊表示，台股今年迄今漲逾1萬7000點，隨指數愈墊愈高，殖利率也變得愈來愈低，若以實際息收分配，恐怕投資人將大失所望。

他指出，今年高股息ETF不管如何換股，也很難維持過去的高息率，並以元大高股息(0056)、國泰永續高股息(00878)和安聯台灣高息成長(00984A)等3檔高息ETF為例，年化殖利率均不到4%，未來勢必得靠豐厚的資本利得，才能補足息率的不足。

◎以下為「阮慕驊」粉專原文：

(發文時間6月21日)

台股股息殖利率剩2.4%，高股息ETF怎麼配高息？又到了除息旺季，但隨著台股加權指數漲到45000點之上，台股股息殖利率愈降愈低，目前低到僅2.4%，不少巴望著領息的退休族，不禁擔心息收是不是會大縮水。台股過去一年來漲了24000多點，今年就漲了17000多點，指數快速上漲，股息殖利率確實很難不受影響而下滑。

除大盤的股息殖利率剩下2.4%，高股息ETF就算怎麼換股，也很難維持過去的高息率。以三檔高股息ETF0056、00878和00984A為例，這三檔ETF目前的成份股和權重計算，年化股息殖利率各是3.80%、3.87%和3.2%，如果以實際息收分配，恐怕投資人將大失所望。

所幸，台股大漲下，高股息ETF的資本利得也相當豐厚，這部份就可補足息率的不足。據我所知，七月將除息的00984A年化配息率仍有兩位數，也就是拿資本利得配出超過10%的年化息率並不困難。其實，買高股息ETF的投資人，本來就是有較高現金流需求，同時追求價格穩定、波動度小的穩健到保守的族群。

所以，比較高股息ETF，除了年化配息率之外，能否在大盤波動時，發揮抗震保值甚至還能增值的優勢。

阮慕驊比較5月12日至6月12日波動較大的1個月，就全部台股主動式ETF的績效觀察，名列第1位的是00984A（6.88%），第二是00401A（5.91%），第三名是00998A（5.77%），其它的都不到5%，負報酬的有00403A和00992A。

00984A是首檔台股主動式高股息ETF，特色是成份股多達上百檔，分散投資標的，而且加入主動操作的精神，並適度佈局成長股，對於想求穩又求息，而且還要有成長性的投資族群來說，不失為可參考的標的。

news.Title: 【台股盤後】AI動能強　漲1276點收47741點續創新高
news.Content:
（中央社記者曾仁凱台北2026年06月22日電）台積電今天股價衝破新台幣2500元大關，率台股開高走高，盤中最多上漲1405.99點，終場集中市場指數上漲1276.31點，收在47741.51點，創台股史上第8大收盤漲點，穩站47000點大關，續創指數新高，成交值約1兆4414億元。

台積電終場上漲100元或4.15%，收在2510元；聯發科漲75元或1.71%，收4465元，台達電與鴻海收在平盤價。

半導體相關類股今天表現強勁，聯電開盤跳空漲停衝上160元，封測大廠日月光投控也收漲停674元，續創新天價。IC設計族群包括聯詠、瑞昱、矽統等超過20檔亮燈漲停。

缺貨漲價的電子零組件方面，PCB族群包括楠梓電、同泰、台郡，以及提供玻纖布等PCB上游材料的南亞、建榮、德宏等多檔股價漲停。

柏瑞投信基金經理人高豪志分析，台灣在全球科技供應鏈的重要性日益提升，他引述外資高盛6月的統計，AI相關企業占MSCI台灣指數權重超過80%，其中半導體占比高達68%、硬體占比約17%，反映出科技業之於台股的重要性，也凸顯台灣在全球AI基礎建設與供應鏈升級中的關鍵地位。

柏瑞投信認為，隨著全球AI產業高速發展，帶動台股企業獲利增長，這波台股行情非僅靠題材推升，而是擁有獲利成長的強大基本面支撐；從國際資金角度來看，台灣已成為北亞AI投資的核心市場，帶動台股長線向上動能。

news.Title: 族群輪動噴出！ 台股大漲1276點 台積電飆2510新高
news.Content:
受美伊停戰激勵，台股今（22）日盤中一度大漲1400點，終場來到47741點創新高，挑戰4萬8關卡，上漲1276點，漲幅2.75%，成交量則來到1.44兆；台積電也同步上漲，尾盤大買6737張，收盤來到2510元新天價，漲幅4.15%。

權值股中，鴻海、台達電收平盤，聯發科上漲75元，來到4465元，漲幅1.71%；受台積電將逐漸收斂28奈米先進製程供給影響，聯電、世界先進有望承接客戶，今日股價開盤即上攻漲停，聯電來到160元，世界先進則來到191.5元。

觀察今日盤面，記憶體族群領漲，南亞科、旺宏、力積電強攻漲停，晶豪科大漲6.95%，威剛漲逾2%，華邦電、群聯也有逾1%的漲幅；PCB族群也走強，楠梓電、景碩、同泰、榮科、建榮、霖宏、聯茂、台郡等近10檔漲停，台光電、台燿也有逾4%的漲幅。

（封面圖／東森新聞）

news.Title: 50%民眾打算持有台股ETF逾1年　國泰國民經濟信心調查揭密！
news.Content:
國泰金今天發布月國民經濟信心調查結果，受訪民眾當中， 50%表示將買進並持有台股ETF逾1年，18%將維持現有部位，13%將買進並於1年內賣出；另外，54%民眾認為AI產業發展為未來一年主要影響台股ETF的因素，而有19%及15%則認為台灣企業獲利與景氣、全球股市與風險情緒亦為主要影響台股ETF因素之一。

調查顯示，有26%受訪民眾僅投資被動式ETF，24%主動式及被動式ETF皆有投資，19%僅投資主動式ETF；54%投資台股ETF的主要目的為長期累積資產，另有16%、7%投資目的為長期領取配息、分散風險。

以下是各項調查結果重點：

●民眾景氣展望樂觀指數與消費意願大幅上升：

國發會最新公布的4月景氣對策信號續呈紅燈，領先指標再度轉為上升，同時指標續呈上升，景氣仍呈穩健成長。

國泰調查則顯示，景氣現況樂觀指數上升至32，展望樂觀指數上升至25.5。薪資現況指數上升至18.8，創歷史新高，大額消費意願指數升至21.6，亦創歷史新高，耐久財消費意願指數升至-0.8。

●59%民眾預期2026年經濟成長率高於7%，58%預期通膨高於2%：

主計總處5月29日預估台灣2026年經濟成長率9.64%，通貨膨脹率1.93%。國泰本月調查結果則顯示，民眾對經濟成長率的平均預期值為7.12%，有59%認為會高於7%；而民眾對2026年平均通膨預期值為2.26%，且有58%認為通貨膨脹率會高於2%。

相較於主計總處，民眾對於2026年的經濟成長預估略偏保守，對於通膨預期則依舊較高。

●股市樂觀情緒及風險偏好指數續升，同創歷史新高：

調查結果顯示，民眾對於台股的樂觀指數升至54.5，風險偏好指數升至40.6，同續創歷史新高。

本次調查於6 月1日至7日進行，針對國泰人壽官方網站會員及國泰世華銀行客戶發出電子郵件問卷，並成功回收共1萬3376份有效填答問卷。

news.AI_Summary:

news.Keywords: solar energy, AI data centers, revenue visibility, backlog, valuation

news.Title: SK Hynix overtakes Samsung to become South Korea's most valuable company
news.Content: By Heekyong Yang SEOUL, June 22 (Reuters) - SK Hynix on Monday overtook Samsung Electronics to become South Korea's most valuable listed company, marking a dramatic reversal of fortunes for a chipmaker that two decades ago nearly collapsed under debt. The company, now the dominant supplier of high-bandwidth memory (HBM) chips used in AI systems for customers such as ‌Nvidia and Alphabet's Google, has emerged as one of the biggest beneficiaries of the global AI boom, propelling a more than 340% rally in its shares this ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SK Hynix has surpassed Samsung Electronics to become South Korea's most valuable listed company, driven by its role as a dominant supplier of High Bandwidth Memory (HBM) chips for AI systems.
• SK Hynix's market capitalization reached $1.35 trillion, exceeding Samsung Electronics.
• The company has experienced a significant turnaround, recovering from near collapse in 2002 to become a leader in the AI-driven semiconductor industry.
• SK Hynix captured 61% of the global HBM market in 2025, ahead of Samsung (17%) and Micron (21%).
• The article mentions Micron (MU) and Alphabet's Google (GOOGL) in the context of the AI memory chip market.
news.Keywords: semiconductors, HBM, AI, market share, corporate turnaround

news.Title: Elon Musk Just Lifted His Tesla Voting Stake to Nearly 20%. Could a SpaceX Merger Be Next?
news.Content: Elon Musk now controls nearly 20% of the vote at Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) . In a Form 4 filed with the Securities and Exchange Commission last week, the electric-car maker's CEO exercised the entire 2018 compensation award -- 303,960,630 options at a split-adjusted strike of $23.34, against a stock that closed near $405 the day of the transaction. He didn't sell any shares on the open market to do it. A separate filing the same day put his stake at 19.9% of the company. Notably, Musk could have waited until August, the default exercise date under his agreement with Tesla. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Elon Musk increased his voting stake in Tesla to nearly 20% by exercising options from his 2018 compensation award.
• This move, occurring shortly after SpaceX's public trading debut, fuels speculation about a potential Tesla-SpaceX merger.
• Musk has previously stated a desire for around 25% voting power to be influential in Tesla's AI and robotics ambitions.
• Despite the potential merger and AI focus, Tesla's core business shows strain with Q1 revenue up 16% to $22.4 billion but a net income of $477 million, representing a very high P/E ratio of approximately 370x earnings.
news.Keywords: voting stake, stock options, potential merger, AI ambitions, valuation concerns

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This ...

news.Title: 英特爾傳與聯電合作3奈米　專家：可望創雙贏局面
news.Content:
（中央社記者張建中新竹2026年06月22日電）美國晶片廠英特爾（Intel）傳出與晶圓代工廠聯電 (2303) 合作開發3奈米製程技術，預計在英特爾的亞利桑那州廠生產相關晶片。半導體業專家表示，短期難以撼動台積電龍頭地位，不過，英特爾與聯電可望創造雙贏局面。

根據FundaAI報告，聯電正與英特爾合作，採用12奈米與3奈米製程技術生產晶片，相關晶片預計在英特爾位於美國亞利桑那州的晶圓廠投產。

台灣經濟研究院產經資料庫總監劉佩真說，英特爾與聯電的合作傳出由12奈米進一步延伸至3奈米，預期這項結盟短期內難以挑戰台積電的龍頭地位。

劉佩真表示，台積電3奈米製程早已步入高良率的成熟量產階段，並牢牢掌握蘋果（Apple）、輝達（NVIDIA）等一線大廠的訂單，台積電建立的技術護城河與客戶信任資產在短時間內很難被撼動。

不過，劉佩真認為這對英特爾和聯電無疑是各取所需的雙贏好棋，英特爾能藉此補足其代工商業模式中缺乏的客戶服務與客製化研發經驗，將空置的亞利桑那州廠房產能有效活化，同時藉由聯電晶圓代工黏著度吸引更多客戶。

至於聯電，劉佩真說，聯電不用付出天文數字的資本支出購買昂貴設備，就能跨越成熟製程瓶頸、順利叩關先進製程的卡位機會，並順應全球供應鏈地緣政治分散風險趨勢，在美國建立具備戰略價值的先進產能，預期雙方深化合作對彼此的財務與長期戰略都將有實質助益。

news.Title: Apple CEO sends worrying message on rising iPhone costs
news.Content: Apple ( AAPL ) customers may soon see the impact of artificial intelligence in an unwelcome place: the retail checkout screen. Apple has always relied on its vast supply chain to shield its premium-device industry from abrupt shocks. That’s helped the corporation keep its hardware engine chugging amid inflation , tariff concerns, and unpredictable customer demand. That margin could be narrowing, however. Higher prices for consumer goods are inevitable as AI data centers require the same memory chips these products use. The problem is not just that the chips are pricier. Apple is battling for supply against a rising ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple CEO Tim Cook warns that price increases for its products are becoming 'unavoidable' due to rising component costs driven by AI data center demand.
• The demand for memory and storage chips for AI servers is creating supply constraints, forcing Apple to compete for components.
• This pressure could impact the pricing of future products, including the iPhone 18, potentially by as much as $270 for Pro models to maintain margins.
• Cook described the current chip cost surge as a 'hundred-year flood,' indicating a significant and unprecedented challenge for the company's supply chain.
news.Keywords: component costs, AI data centers, supply chain pressure, price increases, iPhone pricing

news.Title: 8吋與12吋成熟代工夯，聯電與世界開盤即漲停

• 台積電(2330)結束8吋廠，三星減少8吋廠產能，加上地緣政治因素，導致非中國大陸地區8吋代工產能減少。

• 一般產品需求穩定，但電源管理IC（PMIC）與功率元件訂單大增，推升成熟製程代工價。
• 預期下半年部分產線代工價有機會再漲，明年續漲，聯電、世界先進、力積電獲利成長可期。

news.Title: Dear Microsoft Stock Fans, Mark Your Calendars for June 30
news.Content: June 30 will mark the end of Microsoft's (MSFT) fiscal year and is normally a routine milestone for investors. This year, however, it will be a tipping point for the company's gaming division. The core issue is the Xbox profitability crisis. Microsoft has invested in its gaming division for over 25 years. Even if you exclude the $69 billion Activision Blizzard King acquisition, Xbox has spent more than $20 billion on content platforms in just the past five ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft's gaming division, particularly Xbox, faces a profitability crisis with annual revenue down nearly $500 million over the past five years.
• Xbox hardware revenue has dropped 33%, and overall gaming revenue declined 7% to $5.3 billion last quarter, impacting the More Personal Computing segment.
• Rising component costs are eroding Xbox's thin profit margins, and the company is facing increased competition from Sony and platforms like Steam.
• Significant layoffs are expected in July, potentially affecting 1,000 positions, and there is speculation about a possible spinoff of the Xbox division.
news.Keywords: gaming division, Xbox profitability, revenue decline, component costs, layoffs

news.Title: The Entire Micron Investment Thesis Comes Down to This One Number
news.Content: Most investors believe Micron (NASDAQ: MU) must sell memory into more artificial intelligence (AI) servers to keep growing. That sounds reasonable. After all, the artificial intelligence boom has sparked a massive wave of spending on data centers. Technology companies continue to build the infrastructure needed to train and run increasingly powerful AI models. Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The investment thesis for Micron Technology hinges on the increasing memory content per AI chip, not just AI server sales growth.
• Newer AI hardware generations, like Nvidia's Blackwell chips, require significantly more High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM) compared to predecessors (e.g., 192GB vs. 80GB).
• This trend suggests that even if AI server growth moderates, Micron can still achieve growth through higher memory demand per chip.
• The cyclical nature of the memory industry remains a risk, but HBM's critical role and manufacturing difficulty could differentiate this cycle.
news.Keywords: memory content, AI hardware, HBM, cyclical industry, growth driver

news.Ticker: MSFT, AMD, META, GOOGL, AMZN, AAPL, TSM
news.Title: Why TSMC Doesn’t Even Need to Win the AI Race
news.Content: Most investors are wondering which tech titan will eventually win the artificial intelligence (AI) race. However, I believe there may not be one single winner, as the AI ecosystem is too large and too complex for one company to dominate everything. AI is actually several massive markets stacked together. Today, Nvidia (NVDA) has the dominant position in chips, while Amazon (AMZN) controls the cloud. Meanwhile, Alphabet (GOOGL) has the data advantage, and Meta Platforms (META) holds a massive scale of users. But this is where Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC) is a critical enabler in the AI ecosystem, manufacturing advanced chips for major tech players.
• Companies like Nvidia, Apple, AMD, Google, and Microsoft rely on TSMC for their AI chip production, including Nvidia's Blackwell GPU and Apple's M4.
• TSMC's revenue climbed nearly 41% year-over-year in Q1 2026, with its high-performance computing (HPC) segment, powering AI, accounting for 61% of total revenue.
• With significant capital expenditures ($52B-$56B in 2026) and a strong balance sheet, TSMC benefits from increased competition among AI titans, making it an indispensable player.
news.Keywords: semiconductor manufacturing, AI chips, HPC segment, capital expenditure, supply chain

news.Title: Cathie Wood Loads Up on SpaceX Stock. She Is Betting Big That Musk’s AI Vision Will Pay Off.
news.Content: Cathie Wood has never been shy about backing Elon Musk’s boldest ideas. The ARK Invest founder has long viewed Tesla (TSLA) as one of the most important companies in the world, not simply because of its electric vehicles, but because of its broader exposure to autonomous driving, robotics, artificial intelligence (AI), and energy storage. Now, Wood is making an even bigger statement about Musk’s empire by loading up on SpaceX (SPCX) stock. SpaceX has already become one of the most closely watched public companies in the market. Its shares surged following their debut, placing it among the world’s most valuable ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Cathie Wood's ARK Invest is significantly increasing its stake in SpaceX, viewing it as a vertically integrated platform encompassing AI, Starlink, and defense.
• SpaceX's market cap reached $2.53 trillion following its IPO, with shares surging significantly on its debut.
• ARK Invest's largest purchase was 1.69 million shares of SpaceX for the Ark Innovation ETF, making it 2.12% of the fund's portfolio.
• The investment thesis emphasizes SpaceX's expansion into AI through its acquisition of xAI, positioning it as a key player in AI-powered infrastructure beyond space transportation.
news.Keywords: venture capital, SpaceX, AI vision, portfolio allocation, emerging technology

news.Title: Intel Is Stealing the Foundry Spotlight. Is TSMC Still the Most Important Company in Chips?
news.Content: Intel (NASDAQ: INTC) is having a moment. The stock spiked to an all-time high on Thursday after President Donald Trump said on social media that Apple had agreed to work with the company to design and build chips in the U.S. It was the latest in a run of high-profile interest that includes an announced collaboration with Nvidia . After years of being written off, Intel's foundry comeback suddenly looks convincing -- and the stock is up ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Intel is gaining traction in the foundry market with its 18A process, securing potential deals with Apple, Nvidia, and Amazon.
• Intel's foundry segment revenue grew 16% YoY to $5.4 billion in Q1, but only $174 million came from external customers, with a $2.4 billion operating loss.
• TSMC maintains a dominant position with 70% of the pure-play foundry market and over 90% of leading-edge production.
• TSMC's Q1 revenue increased 41% YoY to $35.9 billion, with a 66.2% gross margin and 58% operating margin.
• TSMC raised its full-year 2026 revenue growth forecast to over 30% and plans significant capacity expansion.
news.Keywords: foundry, chip manufacturing, market share, revenue growth, operating margin, AI chips

news.Title: Jim Cramer Highlights How CEO Lip-Bu Tan Solved Intel (INTC) Foundry Issues
news.Content: Intel Corporation (NASDAQ: INTC ) was among the stocks on Jim Cramer’s radar on Mad Money, as he advised investors to care about where a stock is going, not where it has been . Cramer called it his “new favorite stock in this market,” as he commented: ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Jim Cramer identifies Intel as his 'new favorite stock,' highlighting CEO Lip-Bu Tan's success in resolving foundry issues.
• Cramer anticipates significant business growth for Intel driven by the exploding demand for CPUs in agentic AI, potentially a 4:1 CPU to GPU ratio.
• Intel's foundry business is positioned to benefit from increasing demand for advanced chip manufacturing and a need for US-based supply chains.
• Intel has begun production of its 18A-P chip node, which could attract orders from major clients like Apple.
• The article suggests that while Intel has potential, other AI stocks might offer greater upside and less downside risk.
news.Keywords: foundry, AI demand, CPU, manufacturing comeback, geopolitical risk, investment thesis

news.Title: Down 10% From Its Peak, Is Amazon Stock the Ultimate Summer Buying Opportunity?
news.Content: Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) stock has turned into a bit of a bust so far in 2026. The stock is up only around 7% year to date, trailing the S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) . However, that wasn't true a few weeks ago, when Amazon reached new all-time highs. Now, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon's stock is up only 7% year-to-date in 2026, trading 10% below its recent all-time high, presenting a potential buying opportunity.
• Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the primary profit driver, contributing 59% of profits and showing strong growth.
• AWS revenue grew 28% in Q1, significantly outpacing e-commerce growth (19% international, 12% North America).
• AWS is heavily investing in AI infrastructure, with $200 billion planned for this year, and anticipates multi-year growth cycles.
• Amazon's operating cash flow is historically attractive, and its valuation appears cheap compared to peers like Apple and Alphabet.
news.Keywords: AWS, cloud computing, AI infrastructure, e-commerce, operating cash flow, valuation

news.Title: Is Alphabet the Best "Magnificent Seven" AI Stock?
news.Content: The "Magnificent Seven" -- Nvidia , Apple , Microsoft , Amazon , Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) , Meta Platforms , and Tesla -- have carried the market for three years now, and most investors own at least one of them whether they meant to or not (thanks to index funds). But the seven have drifted far apart. Tesla trades at well over 100 times forward ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet is presented as a top choice among the 'Magnificent Seven' stocks due to its strong performance in both advertising and cloud computing.
• Google Search revenue grew 19% YoY to $60.4 billion in Q1 2026, with AI features driving query volume.
• Google Cloud revenue surged 63% YoY to $20 billion in Q1, accelerating from the previous quarter, with operating income tripling to $6.6 billion.
• Google Cloud's operating margin improved to 32.9% from 17.8%, and its backlog nearly doubled to $462 billion.
• Alphabet forecasts significant capital expenditures ($180-$190 billion for 2026) for AI infrastructure, but the stock trades at a market-average multiple (26x forward earnings).
news.Keywords: Google Cloud, AI, search advertising, capital expenditures, valuation, cloud growth

news.Title: Morgan Stanley gives Google stock investors reason to rethink AI spending
news.Content: Google stock investors were, for the most part, bracing for another AI spending headache. For some context, the tech giant had already bumped its full-year 2026 capex guidance to $180 billion to $190 billion , saying demand for AI compute is “unprecedented.” At the same time, 2027 capex is expected to rise significantly from 2026, according to its Q1 earnings filing . news.Title: Millions of Apple users losing access to Microsoft Office
news.Content: It was a sad day when my classic Apple iPod stopped working and I had to move my music to my iPhone, which wasn't quite up to the task. Apple eventually stops providing hardware service, software updates, and security patches for older devices, which can limit functionality over time. With iPods, after seven years, they could no longer be connected to newer Macs, and mine became a fixed collection of music that could not be updated. "Products are considered vintage when Apple stopped distributing them for sale more than 5 and less than 7 years ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Starting July 13, 2026, some Apple Mac, iPhone, and iPad users will lose full functionality (edit, save, create) of Microsoft Office apps on older operating systems.
• This issue affects both Microsoft 365 subscribers and users with perpetual licenses (Office 2021/2019) on macOS.
• The problem stems from an expiring digital certificate validating Office licenses, requiring OS updates to resolve.
• Microsoft supports the three most recent major macOS versions, and older Macs designated 'vintage' by Apple may not be able to update.
news.Keywords: Software Compatibility, End-of-Support, Operating System Update, Digital Certificate, Reduced Functionality

news.Content: 威盛 (2388-TW) 今 (18) 日召開股東會，董事長陳文琦指出，AI 帶動的產業需求已形成「科技大海嘯」，強調現在還看不到浪尖在哪，不僅推升半導體供應鏈全面吃緊，公司也已取得 3 奈米 ASIC 相關案件，同時，威盛近年大舉整合光 ...

• 威盛透過成立微捷創研、收購德國TRUMPF Photonic Components GmbH資產及整合華立捷，掌握光電技術一條龍能力，看好光通訊與感測是未來重要發展方向。

news.AI_Summary:

• 半導體與電子零組件成為盤面主軸，東京威力科創、Disco、LASERTEC等個股走強。
news.Keywords: 日股, 創高, 地緣政治, 科技股, 半導體

news.Title: 【公告】晶豪科國內第二次有擔保轉換公司債之代收價款行庫及存儲專戶行庫
news.Content:
日 期：2026年06月17日

公司名稱：晶豪科 (3006)

主 旨：晶豪科國內第二 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 晶豪科公告其國內第二次有擔保轉換公司債的代收價款行庫及存儲專戶行庫。
• 代收價款行庫為凱基商業銀行敦北分行，存儲專戶行庫為凱基商業銀行市政分行。
• 此公告依據「發行人募集與發行有價證券處理準則」第九條第一項第二款規定辦理。
news.Keywords: 可轉換公司債, 銀行合作, 募集發行, 財務公告
